name: chart-tooltip-formatter
visual_summary: This is a chart component used to display a tooltip when hovering over points on a chart. It allows developers to customize the appearance and content of the tooltip, making it a versatile tool for visualizing data.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready loader component with the following characteristics:

Description: This is a chart component used to display a tooltip when hovering over points on a chart. It allows developers to customize the appearance and content of the tooltip, making it a versatile tool for visualizing data.
